overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy in a snowy mountainous region. The clip transitions from a vista with massive mechanical Tallneck structures to a foggy forest with Asian-inspired architecture, ending with a rocky approach to a remote village.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with mechanical structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the mechanical Tallneck against the sky
screen fades to black, ending the mountain vista scene

agents.ego_description: standing still on a snowy ridge, looking around and upward at the massive mechanical structure

entered.detail: massive giraffe-like mechanical creature with circular platform head, visible against the mountain backdrop
steep rocky cliff face covered in snow with frozen waterfalls
dense red and orange vegetation covering the ground near the character's feet

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain ridge with the character standing amid red foliage. A massive mechanical Tallneck structure dominates the distant background. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the machine against the cloudy sky before fading to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain meadow with birch trees

events.description: fade from black reveals a new foggy environment with reduced visibility and different vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and bushes on a foggy hillside, passing lines of birch trees

entered.detail: traditional multi-tiered pagoda-style tower perched on a rocky outcrop
tall white-barked birch trees lining the left side of the path
dense tall grass and bushes covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a foggy mountain meadow where the character walks through tall grass. A distinctive Asian-style watchtower stands on a hill in the distance, surrounded by birch trees. The atmosphere is misty with soft, diffused lighting.

events.description: terrain shifts from grassy meadow to rocky path with large boulders
traditional village buildings become visible in the distance through the fog

agents.ego_description: descending a rocky trail between large boulders, approaching a distant village settlement

entered.detail: massive rounded boulder covered in patches of snow and moss
cluster of wooden buildings with curved roofs in traditional East Asian architectural style
tall evergreen pine tree standing alone on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path becomes rocky and enclosed by large boulders as the character descends toward a village. Traditional wooden buildings with curved roofs emerge from the fog in the distance. The terrain is uneven with scattered snow patches and sparse vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vast, snowy mountain ridge into a misty, secluded valley featuring traditional architecture. It begins atop a ridge amid red foliage, where the camera tilts upward to capture the immense scale of a mechanical Tallneck against a cloudy sky. As the perspective shifts, the scene opens into a foggy mountain meadow where the character traverses tall grass toward a distant Asian-style watchtower framed by birch trees. The environment then transitions from the soft, diffused light of the meadow to a more rugged terrain, with the path becoming rocky and enclosed by large boulders. Finally, the camera descends through scattered snow patches as traditional wooden buildings with curved roofs emerge from the fog to reveal a remote village.
